query:
SELECT 
  ms.id, ms.sessionDate, ms.sessionNumber, ms.presence,
  a.name AS aluno_nome, c.name AS mentor_nome
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ms.consultorId = c.id
WHERE ms.alunoId IN (30043, 30045)
ORDER BY ms.sessionDate DESC
LIMIT 5;
